containerDefinitions.name: lap-proof
command: from lap.model_store import resolve_model_path; from lap.detector import Detector; p=resolve_model_path(); d=Detector(p); print('FARGATE PROOF: model pulled from S3, threshold', round(d.threshold,4)); lines=open('data/sample/access_mixed.log').read().splitlines()[:200]; res=d.score_lines(lines); a=sum(1 for r in res if r.is_anomaly); print(f'FARGATE PROOF: scored {len(res)} lines, {a} anomalies')
